name: list_tables
description: List all tables in the database with record counts and column names.

name: query_database
description: Query a database table with optional filters. Returns matching records.

table.description: Name of the table to query.

filters.description: Key-value pairs to filter records. Only records matching all filters are returned.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return. Default 50.

name: insert_record
description: Insert a new record into a database table.

table.description: Name of the table to insert into.

record.description: Key-value pairs representing the record fields and values.

name: update_record
description: Update an existing record in a database table by its ID.

table.description: Name of the table containing the record.

record_id.description: The unique ID of the record to update.

updates.description: Key-value pairs of fields to update.

name: delete_record
description: Delete a record from a database table by its ID. This action is irreversible.

table.description: Name of the table containing the record.

record_id.description: The unique ID of the record to delete.

name: export_data
description: Export all records from a database table in a specified format.

table.description: Name of the table to export.

name: run_sql
description: Execute a raw SQL query against the database. Use with caution as this allows arbitrary SQL execution.
